protecthome_script_access_audit.repair_hint: Do not apply R2 projection yet. WorkingDirectory=/ removes CHDIR, but ProtectHome=yes can still block Python from reading the runner script under /root. Prefer moving/copying the runner to a systemd-safe path outside /root, such as /opt/coinoskobi/bin/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_runner_v1.py, with a plan/dryrun/apply chain.
